content.fact_text: Implementation of the DiscrepancyAuditorEngine for Stage 3 inventory reconciliation.

provenance_data.behaviour: The DiscrepancyAuditorEngine evaluates inventory drift by comparing database snapshots with event-sourced expectations. It employs Opossum circuit breakers for resilience and ioredis for distributed locking to ensure SKU-level atomicity. Detected drifts are logged, and critical discrepancies trigger an exception for infrastructure alerting.
provenance_data.utility: Provides the final Stage 3 logical comparison and automatic reconciliation event generation, ensuring system integrity and alerting for critical state deviations.
